summary: Frontend UI testing for appointment system components. Found CRITICAL BUG: 'Appointments' quick action card is NOT rendering on Doula Dashboard despite being present in the code. Only 3 of 4 quick action cards are visible. Also found that Mom onboarding cannot be completed on web due to DateTimePicker not working on web platform.

critical.issue: The 'Appointments' quick action card (4th card) is NOT rendering on the Doula Dashboard. Code at line 127-138 in dashboard.tsx includes the Appointments action, but only 3 cards (Add Client, New Contract, New Invoice) are visible. The 4th card with 'Appointments' is not appearing in the UI or HTML.
critical.root_cause: Layout issue with flexDirection: 'row' and flex: 1 on 4 children. The actionsContainer style does not wrap items, causing 4th item to be cut off or not rendered.

critical.issue: Mom users cannot complete onboarding on web because DateTimePicker component is not supported on web platform. Console shows 'DateTimePicker is not supported on: web'. This blocks Mom users from accessing the home screen where Appointments action is located.
critical.workaround: Need web-compatible date picker or skip due date during web testing

action_items: FIX: Add flexWrap: 'wrap' to actionsContainer style in doula/dashboard.tsx to allow 4th card to wrap OR change layout to 2x2 grid
FIX: Same layout fix needed for midwife/dashboard.tsx since it has identical structure
FIX: Implement web-compatible date picker for mom-onboarding.tsx (e.g., HTML native date input or react-datepicker)
VERIFY: After fixing layout, test that clicking 'Appointments' navigates to appointments screen
critical_code_review_comments: actionsContainer style (line 219-223 in doula/dashboard.tsx) uses flexDirection: 'row' without flexWrap, causing overflow when 4+ items exist
Mom onboarding uses @react-native-community/datetimepicker which doesn't support web platform
Similar layout issue likely exists in midwife/dashboard.tsx as it has identical code structure

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Login/signup works, but Appointments feature not testable due to layout bug

test_credentials.mom_test: testmom@test.com / password123 (created during testing, but onboarding blocked on web)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 test users via API: testdoula@test.com, testmidwife@test.com, testmom@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Appointments quick action is present in the code but not rendering on the Doula Dashboard. After main agent fixes the layout issue, verify that all 4 quick action cards are visible. Mom onboarding requires web-compatible date picker. Testing via web browser has session persistence issues - consider testing on native mobile simulator for better coverage.

signup_flow.notes: Signup works for Mom, Doula, Midwife roles

doula_onboarding.notes: Doula can complete onboarding and reach dashboard

mom_onboarding.notes: DateTimePicker not supported on web, blocks due date selection

doula_dashboard_appointments_card.notes: 4th quick action card (Appointments) not rendering despite being in code

appointments_screen_navigation.notes: Could not test due to Appointments card not being visible

console_warnings: shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow
Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>
DateTimePicker is not supported on: web
